metadata.title: zeno.team — Solo AI Product Engineer | MVP in 2-4 Weeks
metadata.description: Production-ready MVP from idea to launch in 2-4 weeks. One AI product engineer replaces an entire team. From $5,000. Zero meetings. Crypto payments.

hero.subtitle: One AI-powered product engineer combines PM, design, and development. From idea to deployed product in 2-4 weeks — 10x cheaper than an agency.
hero.subtext: USDT/USDC payments · Zero meetings · Async communication

problem.headline: Building an MVP shouldn't cost a fortune

cards.title: Agencies charge $25K-150K
cards.content: 3-6 months timeline burns through your pre-seed. You spend your entire runway on v1 that might not even find market fit.

cards.title: Freelancers disappear
cards.content: No unified vision — designer doesn't talk to developer, nobody understands the business. 30-40% of time wasted on coordination.

cards.title: Vibe-coded apps break
cards.content: 25% of YC W2025 startups with 95% AI code hit a wall: works locally, won't deploy, security holes everywhere.

cards.title: Finding a CTO takes months
cards.content: 2-3 months searching, $150-200K/year salary. Before product-market fit, you don't even know if it's worth the investment.

howItWorks.headline: From idea to production in 4 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: A streamlined process designed for speed and clarity

steps.title: 01 — Describe your idea
steps.content: Send it via Telegram, Notion, or any messenger. Free-form text, voice notes, references — whatever works. No calls needed.

steps.title: 02 — PRD + interactive prototype
steps.content: Product Requirements Document and clickable prototype in 2-3 days. You see your product before a single line of code is written.

steps.title: 03 — Development in 1-3 weeks
steps.content: Full web application: auth, core features, payments (Stripe), landing page, deployment. Video progress updates every 2-3 days.

steps.title: 04 — Launch
steps.content: Deployed product accessible to users. Source code is yours. Documentation included. Ready for real users.

pricing.headline: Transparent pricing, no surprises
pricing.footer: Payment in USDT/USDC · 50% upfront, 50% on delivery · Invoice via Request Finance

projects.title: Marketplace Platform

items.question: Is this really done by one person?
items.answer: Yes. AI tools (Cursor, Claude, v0) allow one experienced engineer to work at the speed of a 3-5 person team. Pieter Levels earns $250K/mo solo. DesignJoy is $1M+ ARR with one designer. This is a proven model.

items.question: What about quality? Isn't AI code buggy?
items.answer: AI generates ~46% of the code, but every line goes through manual review by an experienced engineer. I don't blindly vibe-code — I use AI as an acceleration tool while maintaining control over architecture and security.

items.question: What if I need to scale after MVP?
items.answer: The MVP is built on a modern stack (Next.js + Supabase/Postgres + Vercel) that handles thousands of users. When it's time to scale, I can help plan the transition to a full team or continue on the subscription plan.

items.question: Why no meetings?
items.answer: Because meetings are an illusion of progress. An hour in a meeting = an hour NOT coding. Text + Loom videos = same information, but you can consume it when convenient, re-read it, forward to investors.

items.question: Is it safe to pay in crypto?
items.answer: Payment via Request Finance — a professional crypto invoicing platform with transparent transaction history. USDT/USDC are stablecoins pegged to USD. Fee: $0.01-2.00 instead of $25-50 bank wire.

items.question: What if I'm not happy with the result?
items.answer: You see progress every 2-3 days via Loom videos and can adjust direction at any point. The prototype is approved BEFORE development. If after the prototype we realize we're not aligned — full refund of the deposit.

cta.headline: Describe your idea — I'll estimate it in 24 hours
cta.subtitle: Send a message with your idea in any format. Get a timeline and cost estimate within a day.

footer.tagline: Solo AI product engineer. Production-ready MVP from idea to launch in 2-4 weeks.
